message:
fix(a11y): ensure mobile touch targets meet WCAG 44px minimum

Add media query for mobile/tablet (max-width: 768px) to set
.view-mode-segment min-height to 45px.

Rationale: Subpixel rounding during layout can cause elements
to render slightly smaller than their computed size. By setting
45px instead of exactly 44px, we provide a 1px safety margin
to guarantee WCAG 2.1 Success Criterion 2.5.5 compliance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
